title: TripWire Dupe
description: TripwireDupe is a Minecraft mod and plugin that enables efficient tripwire hook duplication with optional redstone acceleration, stable performance, and broad platform compatibility.
body:

![TRIPWIRE DUPE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7041700a961e9336dc5ee2cf9ed242d73bae77d8.png)
---

## Description

TripwireDuper introduces a redstone-triggered tripwire hook system that enables controlled item duplication. The system operates only when a precise structure is built correctly, ensuring consistent and predictable behavior.

![NEW MOD EASY2TRADE[![NEW MOD EASY2TRADE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/260846b2e47180c5f1f44ce3d4f404a3727070c8.jpeg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy2trade)
## Speciality:

* Can be built in any direction
* Beginner-friendly setup
* Does not require redstone, but redstone can be used to increase speed up to 1x
* Fully automatic once activated
* Compact and space-efficient design
* Low material cost
* Quick activation and shutdown
* Server-friendly design with reduced entity load

## Installation

1. Download the mod/plugin.
2. Place it in the mods or plugins folder.
3. Restart the server.
4. Build the tripwire structure shown in the video.


## Support

[https://dsc.gg/trickomods](https://dsc.gg/trickomods)
